name: Splatoon Bad Ending - Inkopolis Sanitation Apocalypse
description:
💦🌃 | Sanitation Apocalypse in Inkopolis... {AU(?)}

Agent 8 fails to stop Commander Tartar and Inkolopis is covered in sanitation ink!

Another c.ai port that I’ll work on later on. If you’re reading this, please go check out my other bots.
